code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    mut result = ""
    mut i = 0
    let n = string.len(line)
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        mut nb = b
        if b >= 65 and b <= 90
          nb = b + 32
        else if b >= 97 and b <= 122
          nb = b - 32
        end
        result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(nb)}"
      when None
        result = result
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    print(result)
  when None
    print("")
  end
end
